titlestmt.titleproper: Words of the Worlds Children Collection8525
titlestmt.author: Compiled by RMC Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2020-12-03 18:26:13 -0500.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Words of the Worlds Children Collection
did.abstract: Includes tapes and records concerning language development in children.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: This collection consists of audio and audio-visual recordings, and records of child language. It is cross-linguistic with assessments in each language which are comparable across languages.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes tapes and records concerning language development in children.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Words of the World's Children Collection, #8525. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.subject: Language and languages -- Ability testing.
Children -- Language.
Linguistics.
Language acquisition.

scopecontent.p: These are items that were not included in the original transfer, perhaps still in Barbara's lab. They include their original box number as assigned by Barbara not the RMC box number.
